title: Pungent Smoky Thai Fennel Bulb Pad Thai
description: A smoky and light Thai dish featuring fennel bulb, fried to perfection in a Bangkok-street style Pad Thai, with ayurvedic-rajasic friendly ingredients.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large wok or frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the sliced fennel bulb and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until it starts to soften.
Add the rice noodles and cook for 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the tamarind paste, soy sauce, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the bean sprouts and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the chopped peanuts and cook for an additional 30 seconds.
Remove the wok or frying pan from the heat and serve the Pad Thai hot.
Garnish with additional chopped peanuts and smoked paprika, if desired.
